# Change offboarding decision to “No longer Exisiing”
# Verify the related task status.

1|i0euuv: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Issue 1: Able to edit the fields in HPF record*
Expected Result: Fields should be read only and can't be edit.
Fields - Practitioner, Account, Status, Facility Title, Last Date Worked
Actual Result: Able to edit the Practitioner, Account, Status, Facility Title, Last Date Worked fields.
!image-2025-09-22-23-49-59-223.png|thumbnail!

*Issue 2:Failed to add HPF Number (auto number)*
Expected Result: HPF Number (auto number) should be added in the page layout.
Actual Result: HPF Number (auto number) is missed in the layout.
!image-2025-09-22-23-20-18-933.png|thumbnail!

*Issue 3: None of the fields are tracking enabled on the object.*
Expected Result: Fileds should be tracking enabled.
Actual Result: None of the fields are tracking enabled.

*Issue 4: Inactive Reasion field is not created on HPF record object.*
Expected Result: Should be crete Inactive Reasion field on the HPF object.
Actual Result: Shouldn't shoeing Inactive Reasion field on HPF record.

*Issue 5: For Certain record types the field Global Facility Id is not present.*
Expected Result: Should show Global Facility Id field in HPF record.
Actual Result: Global Facility Id field should be available for all the record types.

*Issue 6: Requested By & Requested Date fields are not present in Contract (Clinician) record*
Expected Result: Should show Requested By & Requested Date fields in Contract (Clinician) record.
Actual Result: Shouldn't showing Requested By & Requested Date fields in Contract (Clinician) record.
!image-2025-09-22-23-57-05-289.png|thumbnail!

*Issue 7: The fields mentioning in the user story fields are missing in Contract (Client - Practice Operations).*
Expected Result: Should show Contract (Client - Practice Operations) fields on the layout.

(NP/PA) Coverage Type

(NP/PA) Hours per Day

(NP/PA) Hours Per Year

(PHY) Blended Hourly

(NP/PA) Blended Incentive Hourly

(PHY) Compensation Type

(PHY) Coverage Type

(PHY) Hours Per Day

(PHY) Hours Per Year

Actual Result: Not showing above mentioned fields in Contract (Client - Practice Operations) record.
!image-2025-09-23-00-00-24-253.png|thumbnail!

*Issue 8: Not able to create a Locums Company record.*
Expected Result: Should be create Locums Company record type.
Actual Result: Not able to crete Locums Company record type.

Issues on Add Additional Fields

1|i0etnr: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as SFO - Richard Caramel
# Navigate to Corporate Support and open a Practice Operations contract (Status = Draft) of a service account. Service Account must have all team members required for approval and 2 users in VP Operations team role
# Submit the contract for approval
# Complete the approval as Performance Analyst, Ops Finance, Client Contracting Queue user
# Verify if the contract is submitted to the last added VP operations user for approval

*Expected Result:*

# Contract should be submitted to the last added VP operations user for approval
# Approvers with Edit access to Contract object are able to edit the contract even when it is locked

*Actual Result:*

# Contract is not submitted to the last added VP operations user for approval
# Approvers (except Ops Finance) with Edit access to Contract object should not be able to edit the contract when it is locked

Practice Operations contract not submitted to correct user when there are multiple VP Operations team members

1|i0eqcv: 30/Sep/25 2:42 AM h1. Observations:



*Scenario 1 :* Shift end time is earlier than start time. --No validation.

*Impact :* Shift duration is showing in Negative (-2 Hours) & User can still proceed with guided form & case will get generated.



*Scenario 2:* Start & end Time is same. → Shift Duration calculate to = 0.

*Impact :* User can proceed with the form. & case is record is getting created.



*Scenario 3:* Without selecting the Shift record. User can proceed on next screen. Covered in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2964?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMjU0ZmY2YTgzNjE5NDQ1MzlmYWJiODAxYjc0YmQ5M2EiLCJwIjoiamlyYS1zbGFjay1pbnQifQ|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2964?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMjU0ZmY2YTgzNjE5NDQ1MzlmYWJiODAxYjc0YmQ5M2EiLCJwIjoiamlyYS1zbGFjay1pbnQifQ|smart-link]

*Impact :* User can proceed with next screen without selecting shift record.& Case will be created.



*Scenario 4:* If you select start time & end time with 1.5 hours gap. Shift duration is rounding off to 2 hours. *Covered in* [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2964?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMjU0ZmY2YTgzNjE5NDQ1MzlmYWJiODAxYjc0YmQ5M2EiLCJwIjoiamlyYS1zbGFjay1pbnQifQ|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2964?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMjU0ZmY2YTgzNjE5NDQ1MzlmYWJiODAxYjc0YmQ5M2EiLCJwIjoiamlyYS1zbGFjay1pbnQifQ|smart-link]

!image-20250918-180357.png|width=890%,alt="image-20250918-180357.png"!



*Scenario 5 : Shift date & time fields are only for calculatiing the Shift duration. Not the shift. It is filtered based on Date.*

[Observation Bug]: Open Shift Apay request Form.

No permission
 stuti.jain 0 stuti.jain 1 QA Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 19/Sep/25 5:55 AM   2 17/Sep/25 10:26 AM SCP Sprint 9 18/Sep/25 1:55 PM *Filter Missing on Facility*
The Facility filter was missed in the original user story *US 302* during requirement analysis and implementation. It was not carried over into the configuration.

*Mass Update Failure*
The issue was not with the update logic itself. Records failed to update due to *manual data setup in QA*. Some records did not meet *validation rule conditions*, which caused the update to be blocked for those records.
Requirements: Misunderstood Requirements

Actual Result - The Filter is not present on Facility and alongwith it when doing the mass update the “Relationship Status” & “Supervision/Collaboration Status” not getting updated.

3-​After filling the details click on Save and a Case record is created.

 Karthika D 0 Karthika D Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project     2 image (59).png 15/Sep/25 4:52 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 15/Sep/25 11:51 AM Not covered explicitly in requirement.
Requirements: Ambiguous Requirements
1|i0egyr: 30/Sep/25 2:41 AM *Description:* The "For additional information about the Company’s data privacy practices, please review our Privacy Policy" URL in the CCPA notice on the Core Connect portal appears as a disabled or unlinked element with a grey color. This is inconsistent with the attached Intake Form document, where the same URL is a standard clickable link with a blue color. This UI inconsistency may lead users to believe the link is not functional or active.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# Log in to the Core Connect portal as a Clinician.
# Navigate to the Intake Form case.
# Locate the CCPA Notice section.
# Observe the color of the privacy policy URL.

*Expected Result:* The URL should be blue, consistent with the attached Intake Form document, and should be an active, clickable link.

*Description:* The "For additional information about the Company’s data privacy practices, please review our Privacy Policy" URL in the CCPA notice on the Core Connect portal appears as a disabled or unlinked element with a grey color. This is inconsistent with the attached Intake Form document, where the same URL is a standard clickable link with a blue color. This UI inconsistency may lead users to believe the link is not functional or active.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# Log in to the Core Connect portal as a Clinician.
# Navigate to the Intake Form case.
# Locate the CCPA Notice section.
# Observe the color of the privacy policy URL.

*Expected Result:* The URL should be blue, consistent with the attached Intake Form document

!image (59).png|width=670%,alt="image (59).png"!

The URL for the CCPA Privacy Policy on the Core Connect portal displays a grey hue, but the URL on the provided Intake Form attachment is blue.

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2872, PR1050558-2939, PR1050558-2940 * Ensure we can easily update the threshold $ amount to bypass approval step 5U
** Setup a Custom Setting to get the the Threshold Amount
* Use Approval Flow
** In Step 5 Use the Custom Setting to set the Threshold Amount
* Add new fields and update FLS for permission with access to the object.

NOTE splitting out AC 2 & 3 to new 5sp Story. 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC 1 is on story [+PR1050558-1740+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1740], this story covers AC 2 & 3

-AC1: Submit for approvals-
-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps-
-When a Facility Change is made (Coverage or Rate changes)-
-And there is a Client Contract (Record Type = Practice Operations) in Status = Draft-
-Then from the Client Contract record’s Summary tab, the user has the ability to “Submit Contract Request”-
-And the following automatically happen:-

* -Client Contract “Status” set to “Submitted”-
* -Client Contract record is- +-locked-+ -from being edited-
* -Approval Work Item records are created for the following approvers: Sequential approval is required-
** -Step 1-
*** -Assigned To: Account Team Role - Performance Analyst-
*** -Action:-
**** -If Approved, then proceed to Step 2-
**** -If Rejected, then send a notification to the requestor and prior approvers [see AC2 for notification]-
***** -And update the Contract status = “Draft”-
***** -Record is unlocked for editing-
** -Step 2-
*** -Assigned To: Account Team Role - Ops Finance-
*** -Client Contract record is- +-unlocked;-+ -allow editing in this step. Lock record after this step.-
**** -Financial Operations captures financial impact on Contract record - updating the Financial Implications field (text, 1000)-
**** -AND Financial Impact (currency, 9 digits, 0 decimals)-
*** -Action:-
**** -If Approved, then proceed to Step 3-
**** -If Rejected, then send a notification to the requestor and prior approvers [see AC2 for notification]-
***** -And update the Contract status = “Draft”-
***** -Record is unlocked for editing-
** -Step 3-
*** -Assigned To: Client Contracting Queue (Existing- [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-472|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-472|smart-link]+-,-+ -but need to add supported Objects Approval Submission)-
*** -Action:-
**** -If Approved, then proceed to Step 4-
**** -If Rejected, then send a notification to the requestor and prior approvers [see AC2 for notification]-
***** -And update the Contract status = “Draft”-
***** -Record is unlocked for editing-
** -Step 4-
*** -Assigned To: VPO - Account team role = “VP Operations”-
*** -Action:-
**** -If Approved,-
***** -And Financial Impact = Yes, then proceed to step 5-
***** -And Financial Impact = No, then update the Contract Status = “Executed”-
**** -If Rejected, then send a notification to the requestor and prior approvers [see AC2 for notification]-
***** -And update the Contract status = “Draft”-
***** -Record is unlocked for editing-
** -Step 5 – *-ONLY WHEN FINANCIAL IMPACT IS UPDATED TO $250,000 or greater IN STEP 2, otherwise skip-*
*** -Assigned To: DOO - Account team role = “Division Operating Officer”-
*** -Action:-
**** -If Approved, then update the Contract Status = “Executed”-
**** -If Rejected, then send a notification to the requestor and prior approvers [see AC2 for notification]-
***** -And update the Contract status = “Draft”-
***** -Record is unlocked for editing-

----

AC2: Notification
Given a Practice Operations contract was submitted for approval
When an Approver “Rejected” OR all Approvers “Approved”
Then an final email notification shall be sent:

* Recipients: requestor and prior approvers
* Subject: <insert Contract Record Type> Contract <insert Contract Number> is <rejected or approved>
* Email Body: <insert Contract Record Type> Contract <insert Contract Number & make it a link to the contract> is <rejected or approved>.

AC3: Approval History [either covered in current story or [+PR1050558-2466+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2466]]
Given I am a user with access to view Contracts (Record Type: Practice Operations) in the Corporate Support apps
When I am on a Contract (Record Type: Practice Operations) record
Then on the Approval tab
And I can view Approval Work Items

* Fields: Approval Work Item Name, Status, Reviewed By, Assigned To, Comments, Reviewed Date 		23/Sep/25 4:13 PM   3 Screenshot 2025-09-17 at 3.56.49 PM.png 10/Sep/25 10:29 PM SCP Sprint 9 10/Sep/25 10:29 PM 1|i0edbv: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a SFO, I want the ability to submit a Client Contract (Record type = Practice Operations) for approval, so that the contract can get approved for Clinician contracting. 16/Sep/25

Facility Change Request: Approvals 2 of 2

Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *clinician contract* record where Status = *Draft*
And I am on the Summary Tab
Then I have the ability to capture “*Anticipated Clinical Hours*” for each HPF

AC2: Prevent adding “*Anticipated Clinical Hours*”
Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *clinician contract* record where Status = *Draft*
And I am on the Summary Tab
And an HPF is grayed out (Removed by using “Add HPF”, see story [+PR1050558-1389+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1389])
Then the user should *NOT* be able to capture “*Anticipated Clinical Hours*” for that HPF

-AC3: Roll-Up Summary of “*Anticipated Clinical Hours*” on the Clinician Contract.- [Split to Story [+PR1050558-2947+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2947]]
-Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps-
-When I navigate to a- *-clinician contract-* -record-
-And I have captured “*Anticipated Clinical Hours*” for HPF(s)-
-Then on the Clinician contract record, I can see:-

* *-Anticipated Clinical Hours-* -(read only, roll-up summary: sum of the “Anticipated Clinical Hours” captured per HPF/Provide Network Contract)- 		23/Sep/25 5:55 PM   5 10/Sep/25 7:41 PM SCP Sprint 9 11/Sep/25 10:19 AM 1|i0e49r: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Recruiter, I need to specify Anticipated Clinical Hours per HPF, which should rollup to the Clinician’s Contract, so that the information can be used for the Contract creation within Conga. 15/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2871, PR1050558-2912, PR1050558-2913 Add new Preventive Care Agreement fields:

* *Stipend Tier (NEW field)*

* *Admin Hours (NEW field)*

Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console app
When I navigate to a *Contract* record (record type = *Practice Operations*)
And Contract Status = Draft
And I am on the Summary tab
And I selected the *Specify Rates* button
And selected Type of Rate = *Stipend*
Then on the Rates Details step, I shall have the ability to capture the following:

* Type (Existing field, no change)
* Facility Title (Existing field, no change)
* Rate (Existing field, no change)
* Unit of Measure (Existing field, no change)
* *Stipend Tier (NEW field, required only in guided experience)*
** *Required, Picklist (single select): Tier 1, Tier 2 , Tier 3, Tier 4, Legacy, Flat, NPPA*
* *Admin Hours (NEW field, required only in guided experience)*
** *Required, number (3, 0)*
** Error message: Please enter a value with no more than 3 digits and 0 decimal places
* Override Prohibited (Existing field, no change)
* Notes (Existing field, no change)

And available navigation options

* Cancel (Existing functionality, no change)
* Previous (Existing functionality, no change)
* Finish (Update functionality, changes listed below)
** Update Preventive Care Agreement
*** *Stipend Tier = values selected by user*
*** *Admin Hours = value inputted by user* 		23/Sep/25 4:14 PM   4 image-20250916-142119.png 10/Sep/25 7:07 PM SCP Sprint 9 11/Sep/25 10:23 AM 1|i0ed7v: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a SFO (Staffing Fulfillment Optimization) user, I want the ability to capture "Stipend Tier" & "Admin Hours" when creating Stipend facility rates, so that we have clearly defined rates for each Service Account. 15/Sep/25

1|i0eca3: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM *Description:*
Corporate Support team members can access the *Inactive HPF report*, but required fields and filters are *not visible* due to missing field-level security (FLS) permissions. This impacts visibility of key report data such as Termination Reason, Last Date Worked, Hospital Privileged Date, etc.

*Preconditions:*

* User is logged in as a Corporate Support team member.
* Inactive HPF report is available in Salesforce.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# Log in as a Corporate Support team member.
# Navigate to Reports → Open *Inactive HPF Report*.
# Review the displayed columns and filters.

*Actual Result:*

* Report opens successfully, but several fields/filters are not displayed (e.g., Termination Reason, Last Date Worked, Hospital Privileged Date, Company Signed Date).

*Expected Result:*

* All required fields and filters defined in the report should be visible to Corporate Support users.

!image (57).png|width=1920,height=1080,alt="image (57).png"!

Corporate Support users cannot view required fields/filters in Inactive HPF Report due to missing Field-Level Access

None

For Emp type = Partner, ( add to existing condition)
Display the fields mentioned above

Facility Offboarding Task
Update the critieria for task creation to include Partner Employee type 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a *Medical Staff Liaison, CET user, or Data Quality team member* in the Corporate Support apps
When I view a *Clinician* record
Then I am able to select Initiate Termination Request and see the following:

* Facility Selection - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|smart-link]
* Termination Details -
** Answer each question below per facility (when HPF status is not -Prospect or- Inactive AND Employment Type is *Partner*):
*** Date Termination Received (date, required)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was received
*** Termination Request Date (date, automatically populated to today)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was submitted or automated
*** Last Day (date, required)
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination (checkbox, optional)
*** Reason for Termination (picklist dependent on Employment Type AND Voluntary Termination, required)
**** Employment Type = Partner and Voluntary = TRUE: Lack Of Advancement, Compensation, Management, Career Change, Retirement, School, Working Conditions, Wrong Job, Mutual Agreement, Status Change - Provider Use Only, Payment Relationship - K-1 Use Only, Family Reasons, Provider Unresponsive, Location, Hours of Coverage, Accepted Another Job, Deceased, Not Disclosed, Work Environment, Lack of Flexibility, Job Abandonment
**** Employment Type = Partner and Voluntary = FALSE: Acquisition/Merger, Attendance, Contract Termination, Misconduct, Performance, Reduction in Force, Reorganization, Gross Misconduct, Violation of Company Policy, Provider Inactivity >12 Months, Privileges Expired, Coverage Discontinued, ADA Accommodation Denied
*** Exit Interview Requirement (checkbox, optional)
*** Bonus Repayment (checkbox, optional)
*** Backfill Recommended (checkbox, optional)
*** Ability to attach files
* Clinician Offboarding case is created with Rehirable checkbox defaulted to TRUE

And Update Facility Offboarding task below to send to HR Queue for Employment Type = Employee*, or Partner*

|Review Contract for Termination|Parent Case = Facility Offboarding|When Employment Type = Employee*, or Partner* HR Queue
All others, Transition Specialist Queue| 		24/Sep/25 12:52 PM   2 09/Sep/25 8:07 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 15/Sep/25 1:51 PM 1|i08c0x:tzzzr 07/Apr/26 4:51 PM As a Medical Staff Liaison, I need to terminate a clinician’s employment at a specific facility in Salesforce, so that I can accurately update the status of employees at facilities that SCP staffs for 12/Sep/25

Given I am a Medical Staff Liaison, Data Quality & Clinician Experience Specialist in the Corporate Support apps
When I view a Clinician record
Then I am able to select Initiate Termination Request and see the following:

* Facility Selection - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|smart-link]
* Termination Details
** Answer each question below per facility (when HPF status is not -Prospect or- Inactive AND Employment Type is Locums, *Leased*, or *Managed*):
*** Date Termination Received (date, required)
**** Help Text: date termination request was received
*** Termination Request Date (date, automatically captured)
**** Help Text: date termination request was submitted or automated
*** Last Day (date, required)
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination (checkbox, optional)
*** Reason for Termination (required, same list regardless if Voluntary Termination is checked or not)
**** picklist values: *Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with Facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider. Per Risk Manager, Privilege Expiration*

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2944, PR1050558-2945, PR1050558-2862 These are manual changes.
Create a new Record type of Case: Clinician Change
Add picklist option to Type : Military Status Change

Add the fields mentioned below to layout and LRP.

* Subject = Military Status change for <Clinician> (system to set upon save)
* Description = <user inserts additional information as needed>
* Contact Name = <system pre-populates with the Clinician’s name>
* Type = User can select “Military Status Change” (required)
* Status = “Not Started” (default)
* Priority = “Medium” (default)
* Case Origin = “Manual” (default)
* Case Owner = “Data Quality” queue

Before Save flow on Case:
Filter based on Record type : Clinician Change
Set Case Owner to Data Quality queue
Conditions if Type = Military Status Change
Set the Subject to Military Status change for <Clinician>

Trigger Points:

Standard Option : Clinician > Cases related list > new single related list added to LRP - Preferred 		0 Kristin Koide 1 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Ability to create a case for Data Quality team for Military Status Change
Given I am a internal corporate support user within the Corporate Support apps
And I have access to the Clinician record
When a Clinician’s Military Status changes
Then from the Clinician record, I have the ability to create a Case with Record Type = “Clinician Change”
And upon initial case creation of record type = Clinician Change:

* Subject = Military Status change for <Clinician> (system to set upon save)
* Description = <user inserts additional information as needed>
* Contact Name = <system pre-populates with the Clinician’s name>
* Type = User can select “Military Status Change”
* Status = “Not Started” (default)
* Priority = “Medium” (default)
* Case Origin = “Manual” (default)
* Case Owner = “Data Quality” queue

NOTE: once case is created for the data quality team, internal manual actions will need to occur as done currently. Data team will need to manually close the case once all actions are complete.

QA Team: per the design, “Type” will be the first field to answer.

----

Below is information from the Kristi’s email, but Phase 1 requirements are listed in the AC.

# +*Military Status Change Requests*+
#* Need a case or task for users to create when they are notified by the clinician of a change in their military status (i.e. called to active duty (deployment), retirement, etc.)
#* Case or task needs to be assigned to the Data Quality Queue
#* Requirements needed with the case/task-
#** Status change to ______
#** Effective date
#** Length of deployment (if known)
#** Option to attach documents to support the military status change
#* Case or task would remain open until the Data Quality team would confirm the new military status (pull SCRA Query, update QGenda Credentialing- system of record).  
#* Once the case/task closes, a notification needs to be automatically sent to:
#** Group emails that are currently associated with the military status checkbox in Salesforce
#*** for RCS
#*** Provider Enrollment
#*** Who else?? 		24/Sep/25 12:58 PM   4 09/Sep/25 11:44 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 11/Sep/25 8:15 AM 1|i08c0x:tzy 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As an internal corporate support user, when a Clinician’s Military Status changes, I want the ability to create a case for the Data Quality team so that internal manual processes can begin. 19/Sep/25

# Need for any corporate Support User with access to the Clinician record. Create a *Case* from the Clinician record for Data quality to inform a name is change
## User can add any additional description as needed
## Related to the Clinician
## Subject = Business Entity Change for <Clinician name>
## Type = Business Entity Change
## Record Type = Clinician Change
## Case Owner = Data Quality queue
## Status = Not Started
### NOTE: Then manual activity to do the updates
# +*Business Entity Change Requests*+
#* Need a case or task for users to create when they are notified by the clinician of a change in entity OR if changing their payroll status from an entity to their SSN
#* Case or task needs to be assigned to the Data Quality Queue
#* Requirements needed with the case/task-
#** Name of current provider entity in the system
#** New name of provider entity
#** Option to attach documents to support the entity change
#* Case or task would remain open until the Data Quality team would confirm the new entity information (create new CTI Record) and terminate/end date old CTI record.  
#* Once the case/task closes, a notification needs to be automatically sent to:
#** Contracting – requires a name change amendment- should this create a new contract request and send directly to the contracting queue for generation? Or sent to recruiter/CET to request?

Given I am a internal corporate support user within the Corporate Support apps
And I have access to the Clinician record
When there is a Clinician Name change
Then from the Clinician record, I have the ability to create a Case with Record Type = “Clinician Change”
And upon initial case creation of record type = Clinician Change:

* Subject = Clinician Name change for <Clinician> (system to set upon save)
* Description = <user inserts additional information as needed>
* Contact Name = <system pre-populates with the Clinician’s name>
* Type = User can select “Name Change” (required)
* Status = “Not Started” (default)
* Priority = “Medium” (default)
* Case Origin = “Manual” (default)
* Case Owner = “Data Quality” queue

NOTE: once case is created for the data quality team, internal manual actions will need to occur as done currently. Data team will need to manually close the case once all actions are complete.

QA Team: per the design, “Type” will be the first field to answer.

Below is information from the Kristi’s email, but Phase 1 requirements are listed in the AC.

# +*Provider Name Change Requests*+-
#* Need a case or task for users to create when they are notified by the clinician of a change in name
#* Case or task needs to be assigned to the Data Quality Queue
#* Requirements needed with the case/task-
#** Name of provider in the system
#** New name of provider
#** Reason for change (marriage, divorce, citizenship, other)
#** Option to attach documents to support the name change
#* Case or task would remain open until the ‘name change’ process is completed (all required supporting documentation received and Salesforce updated with new name… integration should update both QGenda Systems)
#* Once the case/task closes, a notification needs to be automatically sent to multiple downstream systems and/or departments, to notify them of the change, to include:
#** Workday, if EE provider
#** Athena
#** Provider Enrollment Team
#** IT (for updating in the provider’s OKTA profile, etc.)
#** Contracting – requires a name change amendment- should this create a new contract request and send directly to the contracting queue for generation? Or sent to recruiter/CET to request?
#** Notice to the account team of the change, especially the PCC and CET
#** Payroll (EE and/or IC)
#** Discussion for other impacts/systems/teams that need to know… 		24/Sep/25 1:04 PM   3 09/Sep/25 11:35 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 17/Sep/25 12:21 PM 1|i08c0x:ty 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As an internal corporate support user, when a Clinician’s name changes, I want the ability to create a case for the Data Quality team so that internal manual processes can begin. 19/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2713, PR1050558-2751, PR1050558-2846 Trigger : Contract Request OS > Start from Previous active contract
Condition : If executed contract already exists,
Clone Functionality :
Query the Contract, PractitionerNetworkContract, PreventiveCareAgreement, Contract Payment Agreement. EXCEPT : PCA where Type__c = Bonus and its child records.
Clone InitialEffectiveDate from Contract record, if it is populated.
Save the new Contract record and redirect the OS to the newly created Contract record.

On the UI, Validation rule to prevent the Editing of Initial Effective Date if it is already populated
 0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And the Clinician has an Executed Contract
Then I can click on the *Contract Request* button
And the system determines options to display
And user selects “*Start From Previous Active Contract*”
And upon the user completing the guided process, then upon Finish, the system shall:

* Clone Clinician Contract & rates, *EXCEPT for Bonus rates* (clone: contract, PNC and rate records. -Do not clone HPF-)
** Include Cloning the new “Initial Effective Date”
* Direct the user to the newly created Clinician Contract
* Appropriate records are created per the solution

Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps

Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* *Contract* record
Then if “Initial Effective Date” field *is populated*, than I *can NOT edit*. Error Message: {{The 'Initial Effective Date' field cannot be edited. Please contact your administrator for further assistance.}}
And if “Initial Effective Date” field is *NOT populated*, than I *can edit*.

NOTE: Bonus will live on the original contract it was added to, so that we don’t restart the bonus effective date when a new contact is created. 		23/Sep/25 4:14 PM   4 04/Sep/25 12:05 PM SCP Sprint 9 17/Sep/25 2:26 AM 1|i0e0y2:m 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Recruiter, when I need to create a new contract based off of a Clinician’s existing contract, then I want the system to clone all rates except for Bonus rate & clone the “Initial Effective Date”, so that I can ensure the bonuses are added back on as needed and I can see the initial effective date. 17/Sep/25

Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician contract record where Status = Draft
And I select Configure Rates on the Summary tab
Then I am able to populate the following details for a Bonus Rate:

* Type (already built, multi-select, updated in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2430|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2430|smart-link] )
* *Payments* (picklist, required, available for all types)
** Values: 1 Payment, 2 Payments, *3 Payments (NEW value)*
* Payroll Cycle (number, 2 digits 0 decimals, required if 2 Payments is selected in Payments)
** Help Text: Months after milestone
* Duration Months (number, 2 digits 0 decimals, required)
* Work Commitment per Month (number, 3 digits 0 decimals, required)
* Work Commitment Frequency (picklist, required)
** Values: Shifts, Hours
* Repayment Terms (picklist, required)
** Values: Full, Pro Rata
* Rate (already built, no change)
* Unit Of Measure (already built, need to REMOVE for bonus only) 		23/Sep/25 4:15 PM   2 04/Sep/25 11:53 AM SCP Sprint 9 12/Sep/25 7:56 AM 1|i0e3o7: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Recruiter, I need to specify Payment details for bonus for a clinician, so that I can offer appropriate incentives for clinicians to join SCP 11/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1863, PR1050558-1919, PR1050558-2843 Add ‘Not Applicable’ to the picklist Time Type field.
On the existing submit Contract request button/omniscript on clinician record,
Add Time type picklist value on the first screen
Based on the Employee Type selected, the Time Type value is defaulted / pre-populated


* If Contract Employment Type = Locums, set to “Not applicable”
* If Contract Employment Type = Leased, set to “Not applicable”
* If Contract Employment Type = Managed, set to “Not applicable”
* If Contract Employment Type = Employee, “PRN” & “Not applicable” is not a valid value
* If Contract Employment Type = Independent Contractor, could be any value except “Not applicable”
* If Contract Employment Type = Partner, could be any value except “Not applicable”

//Create a Validation Message (if needed) “The entered Time Type value is not a valid entry for Employee”
 0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I request a clinician contract (contract creation guided experience = Contract Request)
Then I am able to specify: (same screen as Employment Type selection)

* Time Type (picklist, required)
** Values: Not applicable, Full Time, Part Time, PRN
** If Contract Employment Type = Locums, valid value(s): “Not applicable”
** If Contract Employment Type = Leased, valid value(s): “Not applicable”
** If Contract Employment Type = Employee, valid value(s): “Full Time”, “Part Time”
** If Contract Employment Type = Independent Contractor, valid value(s): “Full Time”, “Part Time”, “PRN”
** If Contract Employment Type = Partner, valid value(s): “Full Time”, “Part Time”, “PRN”
** If Contract Employment Type = Managed, valid value(s): “Not applicable” 		23/Sep/25 1:52 PM   4 04/Sep/25 9:35 AM SCP Sprint 9 09/Sep/25 5:08 PM 1|i0e0y1: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Recruiter, I need to specify accurate data in clinician contracts, so that they can be contracted with the correct information 11/Sep/25

12/Sep/25
24/Sep/25 12:17 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Matthew Hebert   PR1050558-2929, PR1050558-2928, PR1050558-4433 abhi.kondreddy Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2558
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2715, PR1050558-2753, PR1050558-2842 Record Triggered Flow on Contract, When a new Contract is Executed, and there is an existing contract that is executed,
If Contract.CompanySignedDate >= Contract.StartDate
If Existing Active Contract. End Date is populated and Employment Type of old contract = Employee and New Contract is IC or vice versa, then do the End date update on old contract.
update the Existing Active contract’s End date to newly created contract’s Start date - 1. Use the PreviousContractId to query the Executed contract.
As part of this , update the Old Contract’s status to Cancelled and CancellationReason = Terminated



For scenarios where old contract where EE and new Contract emp type is IC, and vice versa, EE<-> IC
If New IC Contract has PreviousContractid - Use that Id to update the Contract
If New IC Contract does not have previousContractId - Query for Employee Contract with No End Date or EndDate in future - and use that Contract to update if If Contract.CompanySignedDate >= Contract.StartDate





-Scheduled Flow on Contract (to update Contract status)-
-When previous Contract End date = today, then update executed Clinician Contract status to “Canceled”, Cancelled Reason = Superseded-

-When Contract status becomes Executed ( SignedDate is populated), then if there are existing active contracts with End Date in the past, then update the Contract status to Cancelled and Cancel Reason as Terminated. - same employee type , Yes.-
-Scheduled flow on Contracts, Check if a contract EndDate = Today and Contract status != Cancelled and Query for Executed Contracts of the same Employee Type for that Clinician. If its exists, then cancel the contracts.-



[^Clinician-LDD-Integration - Contract Date and Status Update.pdf]

 0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I request a contract for a clinician who already has one executed and active (no end date or end date is not in past)
Then the end date for the already executed & active contract is populated with the new contract’s start date - 1 day
-also update if the End Date on the active contract is already populated and exclude the end date update if the Employment Type/Facility Title has not changed-

Note: the New Contract must be in Status = Executed before setting the End Date on the old contract.

|*Old Contract Employment_Type__c*|*New Contract Employment_Type__c*|*Contract.End Date*|*Contract.Status Previous Contract (Use PreviousContractId when available)*|
|Locum|IC|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|Locum|Employee|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|Employee|IC|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|{color:#ff991f}*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 Update previous Contract Status =*{color}{color:#ff991f} Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Terminated (time based update when the date occurs){color}|
|Employee|Leased|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|IC|Employee|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|{color:#ff991f}*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 Update previous Contract Status =*{color}{color:#ff991f} Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Terminated (time based update when the date occurs){color}|
|IC|Leased|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|Leased|IC|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|Leased|Employee|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|

Refinement NOTES (for information) (Questions):

# Should we update the Contract Status when we has and *end date and the End Date hits*? Below rule applies to just the EE to IC scenarios listed above. *–* *_AC added to column = Contract.Status Previous Contract (Use PreviousContractId when available)_*
## Status = Canceled
## Cancel Reason = Terminated
# IF we run a job and find a Contract with an End Date populated an End Date has past, then can we auto set the Contract Status and Cancel Reason? *backlog story (*[+PR1050558-2929+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2929])
# If there is an active contract (old) with a future end date (9/30) & we have a *new* Executed contract starting today (9/16), then do we update the *Old* contract end date to (9/15)? Yes, ok to retro date based on the New Executed Contract’s start date. 		24/Sep/25 12:17 PM   7 image-20250922-124623.png 04/Sep/25 9:04 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 12/Sep/25 7:55 AM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhzzx 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Recruiter, I need contract dates to be updated automatically, so dates follow specified business rules 13/Sep/24

23/Sep/25 4:15 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Maintenance Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Lisa Kleyla   PR1050558-5597, PR1050558-4133, PR1050558-4293, PR1050558-2892 harshgupta Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2557

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2716, PR1050558-2754, PR1050558-2855 On Service Account - Create a new button that launches a omniscript (error message if user is NOT a VPO: Only the VP Operations can initiate this change. )
Omniscript - Display two options as radio button
Adjust Current leadership
Add New Leader
Next button
Based on selection,
*Adjust Current Leadership*
*Display* Date field
Query the HPF
select id, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, Account.Name, Practitioner.Name, Status__c from HealthcarePractitionerFacility where Status__c != 'Inactive' and AccountId = <CurrentServiceAccount> AND <DateAbove> >= EffectiveFrom AND <DateAbove> <= EffectiveTo and Facility_Title__r.Name <filter>
If no records found display message “No leaderships HPFs are available for the date selected. Proceed forward to add a new leader.”
no further action - user has to cancel/exit the screen.
If records found, *Display* the HPF in table format with HPF records as rows, and the following fields as columns:
Practitioner, Facility Title, Effective From, Effective To, Status, Change
Change options (picklist): Leaving SCP, Leaving Facility, or Title Change,


Action - Create case, based on selection in Change field, (for each HPF record ) – *see AC for mapping*
Subject: Service Account Leadership Change - [Leaving SCP or Leaving Facility or Title Change based on what was selected]
Case Owner:

* If Leaving SCP: assign case to Account Team Clinician Experience Specialist
* If Leaving Facility: assign case to Account Team Clinician Experience Specialist
* If Title Change: assign case to Data Quality Queue

Use Default values for:

* Status: “Not Started”
* Case Origin: “Manual”
* Priority: “Medium”



*Add New Leader*

Query the Code Set for the Facility Titles mentioned in the AC (Facility Title = Assistant Medical Director, EE Assistant System Medical Officer, EE Asst Hospital Med Program Director, EE Hospital Medicine Program Director, EE Lead Midlevel Provider, EE System Medical Officer, Interim Medical Director, or Medical Director)
Display the list as mulit-select picklist

Display picklist Type : Existing Clinician, New Hire

Create case, for each facility title selected – *see AC for other mapping*
Subject: Service Account Leadership Change - [New Hire ] for [Facility Title]
assign case to Account Team VP Operations

OR

Subject: Service Account Leadership Change - [Facility Title Change] for [Facility Title]

assign case to Account Team Clinician Experience Specialist


Use Default values for:

* Status: “Not Started”
* Case Origin: “Manual”
* Priority: “Medium”



!image-20250919-141108.png|width=828%,alt="image-20250919-141108.png"! 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a VPO (VP Operations) in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
Then I am able to select Leadership Change in the highlights panel
And I am presented with a guided screen to fill out the following:

* Adjust Current Leadership
** Date selection
** Then, display a list of HPFs for this Service Account where status does not equal Inactive, Effective From and Effective To dates are within the date selected, and Facility Title = Assistant Medical Director, EE Assistant System Medical Officer, EE Asst Hospital Med Program Director, EE Hospital Medicine Program Director, EE Lead Midlevel Provider, EE System Medical Officer, Interim Medical Director, or Medical Director
*** Columns to Display: Practitioner, Facility Title, Effective From, Effective To, Status
*** If no HPFs meet the criteria, display the following “No leaderships HPFs are available for the date selected. Proceed forward to add a new leader.”
*** _Note: usually a Service Account will only have one HPF that meets these requirements but two is possible (ex. Interim Medical Director AND Medical Director)_
** Optional to select what change is needed to any of the HPFs - Leaving SCP, Leaving Facility, or Title Change
*** If Leaving SCP: assign case to Account Team Clinician Experience Specialist
*** If Leaving Facility: assign case to Account Team Clinician Experience Specialist
*** If Title Change: assign case to Data Quality Queue
** Based on what’s selected, create a case (RT: Leadership Change) with the following:
*** Subject: Service Account Leadership Change - [Leaving SCP or Leaving Facility or Title Change based on what was selected]
*** Case Owner: described above
*** Contact Name: [Selected Clinician/Practitioner]
*** Type: [“Leaving SCP”, “Leaving Facility”, or “Title Change” based on what was selected]
*** Account Name: [Service Account]
*** Healthcare Practitioner Facility: [select HPF]
* Add New Leader
** Display a list of Facility Titles (from Code Set records listed above) for user to multi-select which to add for this service account
** If code set(s) are selected: specify Type: Existing Clinician, New Hire
*** If Existing: assign case to Account Team Clinician Experience Specialist
*** If New Hire: assign case to Account Team VP Operations
** Based on what’s selected, create a case (RT: Leadership Change) with the following:
*** Subject: Service Account Leadership Change - [New Hire or Facility Title Change] for [Facility Title]
*** Case Owner: described above
*** Type: [“New Leader - New Hire” or “New Leader - Existing Clinician” based on what was selected]
*** Account Name: [Service Account]

NOTE: Assumption that the Account Team role = “Clinician Experience Specialist” & “VP Operations” will be setup on the Service Account 		23/Sep/25 4:15 PM   5 image-20250918-135702.png 04/Sep/25 8:50 AM SCP Sprint 9 10/Sep/25 9:59 AM 1|i0e5k6:r 26/Feb/26 1:40 PM As a VPO, I need to initiate leadership changes for Service Accounts, so that I can ensure leadership personnel are in the correct roles at the correct locations 17/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2717, PR1050558-2755, PR1050558-2798, PR1050558-2799, PR1050558-2850 NOTE:
Contract > CPA(n) > PCA (n)
Contract - PNC (Junction) - HPF
Contract has 1 to many CPA . CPA has 1 to many relationship with PCA
CPA record has PNC from which we can know the HPF for the Contract.

Add new Code Set (Locum) and load new Health Cloud Records.


If Contract.Employee Type : Locums is selected,
When Configure Rates for the HPF is selected,
Display the fields mentioned in AC.

Display the Code Set *Code Set (Locum)*
On submit, create the following records with mapping

*Contract Payment Agreement.*Type__c → Locums

*Create PreventiveCareAgreement record for each of the rate type filled*

Monthly Shifts Requested → Shifts_Requested__c

Rate → Rate__c

Unit_of_Measure__c → Default to Per Hour // per hour applies to rate, and per Month for Monthly Shifts requested
Type__c - > Filter CodeSet.CodeSetType = Locum
 0 Jasmine Moradi 13 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I create a *Clinician Contract* where Employment Type = Locum
Then I am able to add the following rate types *per HPF*:

* Normal Hourly (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum “Normal Hourly” Rate)
* Holiday (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum “Holiday” Hourly Rate)
* HM On Call (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum HM Flat “On Call” Rate)
* HM Rounding (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum “HM Rounding” Hourly Rate)
* Travel Hourly (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum Additional “Travel Hourly” Rate)
* Shifts Requested (number, 3 digits 0 decimals) (map to Monthly ‘Shifts Requested”)

_Note: at a client level, locum clinicians have different rates, no need to store at client level_
_Note: Shift Requested, unit of measure will display as “per Month” & on the UI, it will not show the “$” sign._

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2719, PR1050558-2757, PR1050558-2834 In the existing Create HPF omniscript, in Clinician Information screen ,
Placement of the checkbox and validation - Update NPI - screen, (existing)


Add a new checkbox ‘No NPI number’
Query for task related to Clinician of type “NPI Number missing “ and status Closed.


Create a validation error message if Clinician Prof title is one of these - “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA” and No NPI number checkbox is unchecked and if no task if found of type NPI Number missing. Msg - “NPI number is required for this Clinician’s professional title”

If if Clinician Prof title is one of these - “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA” and No NPI number checkbox is checked, create the task mentioned in AC (via IP from the OS)

NOTE: Future attempts to create HPF - if task of NPI Number missing is closed - no need to display the validation error message, as it was bypassed once already.

As part of Clinician Profile Update intake form - make NPI required if Clinician Professional Title equals “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA” and Practicing Status does not equal student or new graduate
 0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter with access to “Create HPF” guided process in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I use the “Create HPF” guided experiences which ask for NPI
Then I am required to populate NPI when the following criteria are met:

* Clinician’s Professional Title equals “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA”

Display the message ““NPI number is required for clinicians with the professional title MD, DO, NP, or PA.””

And when the above criteria are not met, I am able to populate NPI but it is not required

And have Checkbox = “No NPI number” (NEW) - Conditionally visible based on the criteria
Professional Title = NP, PA, MD, DO and
(below) Task is not completed

And if NPI is required (Professional Title equals “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA”) and “No NPI number” is checked, then system creates a task:

* Subject = No NPI number for <Clinician>
* Assigned To = Data Quality Queue
* Status = Open
* Due Date = Today
* Priority = High
* Type = NPI Number Missing
* Name = <Clinician>

And if the NPI number is required and there is a “Closed “ task Type = NPI Number Missing, then allow the user to proceed with “Create HPF” guided experience.

Given I am a clinician with access to the HC Portal
When I am completing an *intake form*
Then I am required to populate NPI when the following criteria are met:

* Professional Title equals “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA” and Professional Status -Practicing Status- does not equal student or new graduate. Display the error message “ NPI is required”

And when the above criteria are not met, I am able to populate NPI but it is not required. 		24/Sep/25 1:06 PM   4 Screenshot 2025-09-15 at 9.23.33 AM.png 03/Sep/25 9:22 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 09/Sep/25 2:26 PM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhx 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Data Quality team members, I need Salesforce to enforce requirements to collect NPI for some clinicians, so that identifiers are populated when available 18/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2724, PR1050558-2762, PR1050558-2852 Updating of the newly created Offboarding Decision is manual by the user

Use one of the existing flow on Case , Record update flow
Filter for offboarding case record type, where case type = SCP,
If Offboarding Decision is updated to “No longer Exiting”,
Offboarding Case updates

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Canceled
* Child Task updates
** Status = Canceled

If Offboarding Decision field to *Confirmed Exit*,

Get all the HPF for the clinician. Get Case> Account. For the Account, get all HPFs.
Check if last day > TODAY

HPF.Effective To = Case.Last Day

HPF.Contracting Status = Termination In Progress

HPF.Anticipated Termination Date = Last Day

If Case.Last_Day__c < TODAY

HPF.Status = Inactive

HPF.Contracting Status = Terminated

HPF.Termination Date = Last Day

Use Dynamic form in Lightning record page on Case, and display these fields only if Type = SCP and RecordType = Clinician Offboarding

Last Day, Termination Request Date, and Termination Request Received

Check if there is already a story where this was implemented.
when all child tasks are closed, update Offboarding Case

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Complete 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician Offboarding case where Type = SCP
Then I am able to update the Offboarding Decision field to *No Longer Exiting*
And the following updates happen automatically:

* Offboarding Case updates
** Status = Closed
** Closed Reason = Canceled
* Child Task updates
** Status = Canceled

Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps

When I navigate to a Clinician Offboarding case where Type = SCP
Then I am able to update the Offboarding Decision field to *Confirmed Exit*
And the following updates happen automatically:

* HPF updates
** Effective To = Last Day
** Contracting Status = Termination In Progress
** Anticipated Termination Date = Last Day
* Offboarding Case updates (occur when all child tasks are closed)
** Status = Closed
** Closed Reason = Complete
* HPF updates (occur when Effective To is in the past)
** Status = Inactive
** Contracting Status = Terminated
** Termination Date = day automation ran
* Person Account updates (occur when Effective To on all HPFs is in the past)
** Status = Inactive

-Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps- (removing, adding to a new backlog story)

-When I navigate to the guided offboarding experience AND a Clinician Offboarding case where Type = Facility-
-Then I am not able to view/edit fields for HPF specific Last Day, Termination Request Date, and Termination Request Received since this lives at the SCP level for full termination-

Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician Offboarding case where Type = Facility
Then when all child tasks are closed and the case is closed
And the following updates happen automatically:

* HPF updates
** Effective To = Last Day
** Contracting Status = Termination In Progress
** Anticipated Termination Date = Last Day
* HPF updates (occur when Effective To is in the past)
** Status = Inactive
** Contracting Status = Terminated
** Termination Date = day automation ran 		24/Sep/25 1:08 PM   6 03/Sep/25 12:28 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 04/Sep/25 11:11 PM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhzzzzzzi 07/Apr/26 1:28 PM As a DMO, I need to indicate a clinician’s final offboarding decision, so that updates can be made automatically as needed 15/Sep/25

When I view a *Clinician* record
Then I am able to select Initiate Termination Request and see the following:

* Facility Selection - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|smart-link]
* Termination Details - originally built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-306|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-306|smart-link]
** Answer each question below per facility (when HPF status is not -Prospect or- Inactive AND Employment Type is Employee or Independent Contractor):
*** Date Termination Received (date, required)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was received
*** Termination Request Date (date, automatically populated to today)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was submitted or automated
*** Last Day (date, required) *update placement to after Termination Request Date*
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination (checkbox, optional)
*** Reason for Termination (picklist dependent on Employment Type AND Voluntary Termination, required)
**** *Employment Type = Employee and Voluntary = TRUE*: Lack Of Advancement, Compensation, Management, Career Change, Retirement, School, Working Conditions, Wrong Job, Mutual Agreement, Status Change - Provider Use Only, Payment Relationship - K-1 Use Only, Family Reasons, Provider Unresponsive, Location, Hours of Coverage, Accepted Another Job, Deceased, Not Disclosed, Work Environment, Lack of Flexibility, Job Abandonment
**** *Employment Type = Employee and Voluntary = FALSE*: Acquisition/Merger, Attendance, Contract Termination, Misconduct, Performance, Reduction in Force, Reorganization, Gross Misconduct, Violation of Company Policy, Provider Inactivity >12 Months, Privileges Expired, Coverage Discontinued, ADA Accommodation Denied
**** *Employment Type = Independent Contractor*: Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with Facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider. Per Risk Manager, Privilege Expiration
*** Exit Interview Requirement (checkbox, optional)
*** Bonus Repayment (checkbox, optional)
*** *Backfill Recommended (checkbox, optional)*
*** Ability to attach files
* *Clinician Offboarding case is created with Rehirable checkbox defaulted to TRUE* 		24/Sep/25 1:10 PM   4 image-20250911-014653.png 02/Sep/25 11:54 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 09/Sep/25 2:39 PM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhzzzzzx 07/Apr/26 4:59 PM As a Medical Staff Liaison, I need to terminate a clinician’s employment at a specific facility in Salesforce, so that I can accurately update the status of employees at facilities that SCP staffs for 09/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2726, PR1050558-2764, PR1050558-2849 In the existing oS for Open Shift APAY , add the three fields. The fields are mapped to Case (of record type Rate Approval)

* APAY Used for the Month (currency, 8 digits 0 decimals, required)
* APAY Budgeted (currency, 8 digits 0 decimals, required)
* Shift Compensation (formula, Shift Duration (first screen) * Clinician Rate (hourly rate entered in second screen, only when unit of measure is per hour).

Updated Help Text on % of Clinicians Contracted to Work to “Recruiting % without Candidates”
* On save,
Rate Approval case record is already being created in submitted status
Create approval process/ modify existing approval process to accommodate the approval mentioned in AC

When APAY Used for the Month + Amount (Shift Compensation formula or amount specified per Shift) - If on the second screen, unit of measure is per hour, is selected - then Use the Shift compensation formula specified as part of this story, if unit of measure is per hour is not selected, then use the Amount .

!image-20250914-222547.png|width=831,height=538,alt="image-20250914-222547.png"!

!image-20250914-222531.png|width=828,height=539,alt="image-20250914-222531.png"! 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician Experience Specialist or Scheduler in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
Then I am able to go through the guided [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-309|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-309|smart-link] process

* APAY Used for the Month (currency, 8 digits 0 decimals, required)
* APAY Budgeted (currency, 8 digits 0 decimals, required)
* Shift Compensation (formula, length of shift input in first screen * hourly rate entered in second screen, only when unit of measure is per hour)
* Updated Help Text on % of Clinicians Contracted to Work to “Recruiting % without Candidates”

And when I select Save

* Case record is created
** Status = Submitted
* Approval Work Item is created related to the Rate Approval case record
** When APAY Used for the Month + Amount (Shift Compensation formula or amount specified per Shift) in this APAY Request is greater than the APAY Budgeted, assigned To: Account Team - DOO
** All others (else), assigned to Account Team - VPO
** Rate Approval case is locked from being edited
* Approve/Reject Actions
** When users approve/reject they can add comments
** Send Final notification (Rejected or approved) to request submitter and all approvers with comments
** Approved:
*** Case Status updated to Approved
** Not Approved:
*** Case Status updated to Not Approved



Assumption is that the Service Account has the following team roles, if not the approval will be rejected.

* Account Team - DOO
* Account Team - VPO 		24/Sep/25 3:16 PM   4 image-20250914-222531.png 02/Sep/25 11:12 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 10/Sep/25 4:31 AM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhzzzzi 02/Mar/26 3:40 PM As a Clinician Experience Specialist or Scheduler, I need to request shift-specific bonus approval in Salesforce, so that I can offer appropriate incentives for clinicians to work a hard-to-staff shift 15/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2464, PR1050558-2463, PR1050558-2484 Create a Platform Event

* Name: Clinician Offboarding Request (Use same API name in Story - Integration Dependency)
** API Name: Clinician_Offboarding_Request__c
* Fields
** Type: Type__c, Text(200)
** Business Entity Name: Business_Entity_Name__c, Text(200)
** Global Provider Id: Global_Provider_Id__c, Text(200)
** Tax Id: Tax_Id__c, Text(200)
** Reason Description: Reason_Description__c, Text(32000)
** Employee ID: Employee_ID__c, Text(200)
** Termination Date: Termination_Date__c, Date
** Last Day of Work: Last_Day_of_Work__c, Date
** Primary Reason: Primary__Reason__c, Text(200)
** Pay Through Date: Pay_Through_Date__c, Date



Create or Update a Record Triggers Flow Case for *Created*

Condition: Record Type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = SCP is Created

* Update Contract lookup into Case
** SELECT Id from Contract where Employemnt_Type__c = “Employee” OR Employemnt_Type__c = “Independent Contractor” AND Status = “Executed” Order By CompanySignedDate DESC LIMIT 1
** Update Case.Contract__c = ContractId



Create or Update a Record Triggers Flow Case for *Update*

* Condition: Record Type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = SCP is updated so that Status = Closed and Closed Reason = Complete

# Case > Contract > Employee Type = “Employee” Then
## Create a Platform Event record Clinician_Offboarding_Request__e
### Type = “Employee”
### Employee ID = Case.Contact.Employee_Id__c
### Termination Date = Case.Termination_Request_Date__c {color:#ff991f} {color}
### Last Day of Work = Case.Last_Day__c
### Primary Reason = Case.Reason_for_Termination__c
### Reason Description = Case.Description
### {color:#ff991f}Pay Through Date = Case.Last_Day__c - Review this logic {color}[~accountid:712020:7c226bec-924b-4638-a65d-349a3d91b34b] , [~accountid:712020:b8b82845-1665-49bb-bced-ce96d04329bd]
### Rehireable__c = Case.Contact.Rehireable__c
# Case > Contract > Employee Type = “Independent Contractor” Then
## {color:#ff991f}SELECT Corporate_Tax_ID__c, Corporation_Name__c FROM Corporation_and_Tax_Information__c WHERE Clinician__c = Case.ContactId AND Expiration_Date__c <> null AND Status__c = “Verified' ORDR BY Effective_Date__c DESC LIMIT 1 - Review this logic {color}[~accountid:712020:7c226bec-924b-4638-a65d-349a3d91b34b] , [~accountid:712020:b8b82845-1665-49bb-bced-ce96d04329bd]
## Create a Platform Event record Clinician_Offboarding_Request__e
### Type = “Independent Contractor”
### Business Entity Name = {color:#ff991f}Corporation_Name__c{color} from STEP 2.a
### Global Provider Id = Case.Contact.Global_Provider_ID__c
### Tax Id = {color:#ff991f}Corporate_Tax_ID__c{color} from STEP 2.a
### Reason Description = Case.Description 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project -Given I am an Integration User in the HC org-
-When a case record where Record Type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = SCP is updated so that Status = Closed and Closed Reason = Complete-
-Create a custom Platform Event with the following:-

* -Platform Event, Name = Clinician Offboarding Request-
** -Type = “Terminate IC”-
** -Business Entity Name-
** -Global Provider Id-
** -Tax Id-
** -Reason Description-
*** -Values: Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider, Per Risk Manager, Privileges-
** -insurance expiration date - view HPF value on Case-
** -privilege expiration date - view HPF value on Case-
* -Platform Event, Name = Clinician Offboarding Request-
** -Type = “Terminate EE”-
** -Employee ID-
** -Termination Date = Last Day (Offboarding Case)-
** -Last Day of Work = Last Date Worked (HPF, could be blank, if multiple use the most recent)-
** -Primary Reason = Reason for Termination (Offboarding Case)-
** -Reason Description = should not be different than Primary Reason, we don’t have a free text field for this built-
** -Pay Through Date = Pay Through Date (Offboarding Case)-
** -Rehireable = Eligible for Rehir-

When I attempt to close a Clinician Offboarding (Type = SCP) to Status = Closed and Closed Reason = Complete
Then I am not able to save if all of the fields below are not populated:

* Date Termination Received
* Termination Request Date
* Last Day
* Pay Through Date (create this field to default to 'Last Day' but can be updated if needed)
* Reason for Termination - finalized list was provided via email JM to update
* Primary Reason
** Values: Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider, Per Risk Manager, Privileges

10/Sep/25 12:04 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Offboarding Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Kristi Bouillion   PR1050558-2218, PR1050558-2223, PR1050558-2426, PR1050558-1708, PR1050558-2436 tapas.dey Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2450

 hinduja.goli PR1050558-2475, PR1050558-2519, PR1050558-2478 single place for IT to adjust time from 12 months (ex. to 6 months)

Create an apex batch job that runs daily. It will query all related sites for the clinician and then look for the HPF’s belonging to that sites. If the Last Worked Date is more tahn a year and newer that the other ones we proceed to inactivate.

Batch job on HPF
Query for HPF where Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive. Get related Clinician records as well
Filter HPF by the following
Today - HPF.Last_Date_Worked__c >=12 months

NOTE
For *A clinician has never worked*:_If Last Date Worked is blank, check the Company Signed Date (aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites,_

Sister sites relationship are captured in Account Account relatioship
Look for active contract that are older than a year, then see if the last date worked is blank

Check the same conditions for all other sites (using the AAR relationship) .. and if they are true we update
If any one of them do not satisfy the conditions( meaning active contract older than a year, but have the last date worked populated) we break/skip the update 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I view a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record *where the following is true:*

* If the HPF Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive
* *A clinician hasn’t worked in a year*:
** Last Date Worked (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites that a clinician works at (Account field on HPF where status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive)
* *A clinician has never worked*:
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) is blank, check the Company Signed Date (on Clinician Contract, aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) and Company Signed Date (Clinician Contract) are both blank, Hospital Privileged Date (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites

Then the HPF record is automatically updated with the following:

* Status = Inactive
* Credentialling Status = Inactive
* Termination Date = date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away

And the Clinician record is updated so that I-9 Status is blank

{color:#403294}*ITEMS ABOVE ARE BUILT IN* {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1580|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1580|smart-link]{color:#403294} {color}

*for this user story:*

*And all open cases, child cases, tasks related child cases, & tasks related to the clinician are updated to Status = Closed* 		10/Sep/25 12:04 PM   5 image-20250821-105158.png 02/Sep/25 6:52 AM SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 02/Sep/25 6:52 AM 1|i08pz4:qzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzv 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Data Quality team member, I need clinicians to be inactivated if they haven’t worked in 12 months, so that our clinician data is clean 21/Aug/25

Then I am able to configure the following:

* Shift Bonus becomes it’s own shift record where the rate includes the bonus
** Need ability to specify a Shift Type = “Shift Bonus” (new Code Set - Shift)
** Unit of Measure has to be “Per Shift”
** Associate this shift with the appropriate pay tags in Salesforce to enable integration to QGenda
** In QGenda, adding shift to the bonus shift is manual for phase 1
* No other Bonus types are needed for Client Contracts - remove Bonus option

And Update Shift “Shift Iteration” Text from “20” to '255”



NOTE:

* Need a way to relate “Shift Bonus” with a Shift record. Example how we will handled in phase 1:
** Shift type= “Shift Bonus”
** *Iteration* (Text 20) = “Night 1” (user to will input the Shift name that the Bonus is related to)
** Shift Full Name = Shift Bonus Night 1 (will have it’s own pay codes)



Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I am on a Clinician Contract record
And I configure rates where type of rate = Shift
Then I am able to see the following: (filtered by Employment type and facility title - NOT changing the filtering functionality for rates. ) – NO NEW BUILD REQUIRED

* Recruiters select the appropriate shift (with or without the bonus) to associate with a clinician
* Recruiters have the ability to also unselect/select “Shift Bonus” as needed for the clinician (same filtering functionality as any other Shift rate)



Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I am on a Clinician Contract record
And I configure rates where type of rate = Bonus
Then I am able to see the following:

* Clinician bonus should have the following Types available: Sign On Bonus, Commencement Bonus, Relocation Bonus, New Grad Bonus, Retention Bonus, Locums Buyout, Other Bonus
* User can only add Additional bonus types to one Healthcare Practitioner Facility (primary) [story [+PR1050558-2086+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2086]]
* Once the “Type” field that holds the Additional Bonuses values is selected, then the following fields are required see story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2123|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2123|smart-link] 		23/Sep/25 4:16 PM   5 image-20250915-193001.png 28/Aug/25 12:15 PM SCP Sprint 9 09/Sep/25 3:38 PM 1|i0cyyy:9 18/Feb/26 1:05 PM As a Recruiter, I need to specify bonuses for clinicians, so that they can be included in contracts and clinicians can be paid appropriately 15/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2734, PR1050558-2771 Create new field Insurance Provided By on HPF. Add to layout.

Add a row to existing Custom Metadata, to capture the table of Facility title and Insurance provided by.
When HPF is created ( using flow trigger),

Validation Rule on HPF
HPF> Facility title ! = Locum && HPF. Insurance Provided by == SCP Insured Locums OR Locum Company
OR
HPF> Facility title == External Locums, HPF.Insurance Provided By = SCP OR Commercial OR Hospital
Throw validation error “The selected value is invalid for this clinician’s HPF“

0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a MSL in the Corporate Support apps
When I attempt the following changes on a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record

** IF Facility Title does not equal External Locums, Insurance Provided By = SCP Insured Locums OR Locum Company
* *External Locums using Non-Locums Insurance*
** If Facility Title equals External Locums, Insurance Provided By = SCP OR Commercial OR Hospital

And I receive the following error message at the Insurance Provided By field: “The selected value is invalid for this clinician’s HPF”



Given I am a MSL in the Corporate Support apps
When a HPF record is created
Then the Insurance Provided By field is populated according to the logic below:

* If Facility Title is External Locums - Locum Company
* If Facility Title is Leased Employee or Leased Medical Director - Hospital
* If Facility Title is Managed - Hospital
* For all others - use the Insurance Provided By value on the Service Account record 		24/Sep/25 12:30 PM   3 28/Aug/25 9:51 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 15/Sep/25 2:57 PM 1|i08pz4:zzzz9 23/Mar/26 9:55 AM As a MSL, I need the Insurance Provided By field to have validation rules defined, so that the field is populated with the valid values 12/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1874, PR1050558-1930, PR1050558-2838 Use the existing omniscript of creating PCA record, where we get the rates from the client contract (that are executed, and there is a Create PCA and CPA step.

ContractPaymentAgreement - has both Service Account and Contract
Rate Pay code is child of Preventive Care agreement
Preventive care agreement is child of Contract Payment Agreement (MD)
Preventive care agreement is child of Contract and has lookup to PNC

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2253, PR1050558-2254, PR1050558-2502, PR1050558-2736, PR1050558-2773, PR1050558-2839 On the existing, Contract request omniscript - (when a new contract for clinician, it displays HPFs for selection and the Add HPF omniscript). Check if the Employment_Type__c is Employee Time_Type__c is Full time, and clinician Professional_Title__c title is NP or PA.

Query the NPPA_Tier__c from the SA’s Contract. ( via HPF) (Query for Contract of rec type practice operation for AccountId = HPF.AccountId
Get NPPA Tier from the Client Contract (for that Clinician, Clinician > HPF> SA, Query Practice Operations contract of status executed (there should be only one , Order by LastModifiedDate DSC)
if all of the contracts for selected HPF have the same value in the NPPA_Tier__c field, then display that field as read only.
If they do not have the same value,
Display Message “Upon Submit Contract Request, then an approval will be sent to review NP/PA Tier mismatch“
Display a picklist with the drop down value of the selected HPF’s client Contract ( from query above), so that the user selects it.
Map it to the Clinician contract’s WaitingForApproval_NPPA_Tier__c field. This should be added to DD. Will not be displayed on the layout.


When Contract status = Submitted or as part of the Submit contract flow, Create a approval record ( the existing process for Clinician escalation), and assign to Account team regional director of nppa services.
After Approved, stamp the value from WaitingForApproval_NPPA_Tier__c to NPPA_Tier on clinician contract.


/ / Captured at Add HPF and Create Contract HPF selection 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project +Clinician Side:+

Given I am a Recruiter in the corporate support apps
When I request a contract for a *full time employee NP/PA* clinician
Then I can specify NP/PA Tier for that clinician

* If Service Accounts from selected HPFs have the same NP/PA Tier
** Default NP/PA Tier and do not show a selection (show value, but read only)
* If Service Accounts from selected HPFs do not have the same NP/PA Tier
** Recruiter must select one NP/PA Tier from what values (unique values) are available at those facilities. (Design is to implement an validation rules with error if the user selects a NPPA tier values that is NOT applicable = “Please select an NPPA Tier value based on your chosen facilities”.
*** Display a message that Upon Submit Contract Request, then an approval will be sent to review NP/PA Tier mismatch
** And an approval record is created for Account Team Regional Director of NPPA Services to review NP/PA Tier mismatch (NOTE: upon clicking ‘Submit Contract Request’ button, then send approval)

--below 2 ACs moved to [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2785|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2785|smart-link] —

-Given I am a Recruiter in the corporate support apps-
-When I request a contract for a- *-non full time employee NP/PA clinician-*
-Then I can specify Hour Commitment per HPF selected (number, 3 digits no decimals)-

-Given I am a Payroll team member in the Corporate Support apps-
-When EE NP/PA rates are specified for a clinician (using per hour unit of measure)-
-Then the following calculations are done automatically:-

* -EE NP/PA Full Time Weekly Blended-
** -Hourly Rate averaged across all HPFs * 40-
* -EE NP/PA Hourly Blended-
** -Hourly Rate averaged across all HPFs-
* -EE NP/PA Full Time Overage Rate-
** -Hourly Rate averaged across all HPFs + $2-
* -EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended-
** -EE NP/PA Hourly Blended * NP/PA Tier-

additional notes:
_FT EE NP/PA clinicians have one monthly salary blended in contract_
_PT EE NP/PA clinicians have one hourly blended rate in contract_
_for FT and PT - QGenda stores blended hourly rate_
_for FT - Workday stores annual salary_
_for PT - Workday stores hourly blended rate_
if clinician has Night Shift Bonus, sent to QGenda and applies only for some shifts 		23/Sep/25 4:18 PM   6 27/Aug/25 12:07 PM SCP Sprint 9 03/Sep/25 12:31 PM 1|i0c83k: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a Clinician Contract Specialist, I need to view NP/PA tiers and where clinicians are expected to practice, so that I can generate contracts accurately 16/Sep/25
